'''ât-m-f''' ('''katamaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moil|moil]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moil|moil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ât-m-f
|-
! Lemma
| katamaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitamaf|thitamaf]] || [[word:jitamaf|jitamaf]] || [[word:shitamaf|shitamaf]] || [[word:kitamaf|kitamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthutamaf|thuthutamaf]] || [[word:jujutamaf|jujutamaf]] || [[word:shushutamaf|shushutamaf]] || [[word:kukutamaf|kukutamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thutamaf|thutamaf]] || [[word:jutamaf|jutamaf]] || [[word:shutamaf|shutamaf]] || [[word:kutamaf|kutamaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thutamaf|thutamaf]] || [[word:jutamaf|jutamaf]] || [[word:shutamaf|shutamaf]] || [[word:kutamaf|kutamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thetamaf|thetamaf]] || [[word:jetamaf|jetamaf]] || [[word:shetamaf|shetamaf]] || [[word:ketamaf|ketamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothotamaf|thothotamaf]] || [[word:jojotamaf|jojotamaf]] || [[word:shoshotamaf|shoshotamaf]] || [[word:kokotamaf|kokotamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thotamaf|thotamaf]] || [[word:jotamaf|jotamaf]] || [[word:shotamaf|shotamaf]] || [[word:kotamaf|kotamaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thotamaf|thotamaf]] || [[word:jotamaf|jotamaf]] || [[word:shotamaf|shotamaf]] || [[word:kotamaf|kotamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠtamaf|thĂŠtamaf]] || [[word:jĂŠtamaf|jĂŠtamaf]] || [[word:shĂŠtamaf|shĂŠtamaf]] || [[word:kĂŠtamaf|kĂŠtamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathatamaf|thathatamaf]] || [[word:jajatamaf|jajatamaf]] || [[word:shashatamaf|shashatamaf]] || [[word:kakatamaf|kakatamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thatamaf|thatamaf]] || [[word:jatamaf|jatamaf]] || [[word:shatamaf|shatamaf]] || [[word:katamaf|katamaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thatamaf|thatamaf]] || [[word:jatamaf|jatamaf]] || [[word:shatamaf|shatamaf]] || [[word:katamaf|katamaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shatamaf|shatamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshatamaf|goshatamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishatamaf|gokishatamaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shatamafnĂŒ|shatamafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshatamafnknĂŒ|goshatamafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishatamafnĂŒ|gokishatamafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shatamafshĂ«|shatamafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshatamafnkshĂ«|goshatamafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishatamafshĂ«|gokishatamafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatamafro|shatamafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatamafnkro|goshatamafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatamafro|gokishatamafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shatamafmu|shatamafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatamafnkmu|goshatamafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatamafmu|gokishatamafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shatamafsher|shatamafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshatamafnksher|goshatamafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishatamafsher|gokishatamafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shatamafng|shatamafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshatamafnkng|goshatamafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishatamafng|gokishatamafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shatamafya|shatamafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshatamafnkya|goshatamafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishatamafya|gokishatamafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shatamafyam|shatamafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshatamafnkyam|goshatamafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishatamafyam|gokishatamafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatamafnĂŒshĂ«|shatamafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatamafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshatamafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatamafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishatamafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatamafnĂŒro|shatamafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatamafnknĂŒro|goshatamafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatamafnĂŒro|gokishatamafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatamafnĂŒmu|shatamafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatamafnknĂŒmu|goshatamafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatamafnĂŒmu|gokishatamafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatamafshĂ«nĂŒ|shatamafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatamafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshatamafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatamafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishatamafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatamafshĂ«ro|shatamafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatamafnkshĂ«ro|goshatamafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatamafshĂ«ro|gokishatamafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatamafshĂ«mu|shatamafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatamafnkshĂ«mu|goshatamafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatamafshĂ«mu|gokishatamafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatamafronĂŒ|shatamafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatamafnkronĂŒ|goshatamafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatamafronĂŒ|gokishatamafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatamafroshĂ«|shatamafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatamafnkroshĂ«|goshatamafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatamafroshĂ«|gokishatamafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shatamafromu|shatamafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshatamafnkromu|goshatamafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishatamafromu|gokishatamafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shatamafmunĂŒ|shatamafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshatamafnkmunĂŒ|goshatamafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishatamafmunĂŒ|gokishatamafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shatamafmushĂ«|shatamafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshatamafnkmushĂ«|goshatamafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishatamafmushĂ«|gokishatamafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shatamafmuro|shatamafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshatamafnkmuro|goshatamafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishatamafmuro|gokishatamafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
